/CAL:PROBATION MATTER ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR TERMINATION/CTORD:PROBATION IN#19000546 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSEDCHARGES  MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,19001027,/

/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 2 Y:PJ 16D/CTS:16/VF2:150/RESTR/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO NOT POSSESS ANY BURGLARY TOOLS/SA2:1926 PINE ST, AND 1660 GOUGH ST,,SF/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:1-29-19/987,2/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA4:1660 GOUGH ST, SF CA/SAORD/ /CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/CONTD: STATUS OF M99 HOLD & STATUS OF CUSTODY/DOP/X:01-28-19 COURT DATE IN M11 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONFIRMED/
